---
name: Bug report
about: Report a reproducible problem — be concise and exact.
---

**Title:** Short summary of the failure

**What happened (brief):**

One-line failure statement.

**Steps to reproduce:**

1. Exact commands I ran
2. Environment details (distro, package versions)
3. Any special hardware notes (NVIDIA/Intel/AMD)

**Expected result:**

What should have happened.

**Actual result:**

What happened instead — include exact error messages and relevant logs.

**Logs / output:**

Attach minimal logs or file paths (paste truncated output, not entire logs).

**Priority:** P0 / P1 / P2

**Workaround (if any):**

Describe any temporary mitigation.

---
**Contact:** Natalie Spiva <natalie@acreetionos.org>
